description: The Ministry of Local Government has split the 'Tikonko' chiefdom in Bo District. Update the DHIS2 hierarchy (admin/district) by creating a new Organisation Unit named 'Tikonko North' (Short name: 'Tikonko N') as a child of 'Bo' District with an opening date of 2023-01-01. Move the existing facilities 'Tikonko CHC' and 'Gondama MCHP' from their current locations into the new 'Tikonko North' chiefdom.
